sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19618" key="ba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰ´τ-ης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n19618.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one that treads</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covers,</tr_> expld. by <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πίθηκος, ἀναβάτης,</foreign> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
